name: PT. Bank Pembangunan Daerah Banten, Tbk
summary: PT. Bank Pembangunan Daerah Banten, Tbk provides various banking services in Indonesia. It offers demand, savings, and time deposits, as well as current accounts; and investment, working capital, and consumer loans. The company also provides consumer, employee, and MSME credit services, as well as e-banking services. As of December 31, 2020, it operated approximately 150 automated teller machines. The company was formerly known as PT Bank Pundi Indonesia, Tbk and changed its name to PT. Bank Pembangunan Daerah Banten, Tbk in August 2016. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Serang, Indonesia. PT. Bank Pembangunan Daerah Banten, Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Banten Global Development.
